nasb.text: When he had brought him down, behold, they were spread over all the land, eating and drinking and dancing because of all the great spoil that they had taken from the land of the Philistines and from the land of Judah.

esv.text: And when he had taken him down, behold, they were spread abroad over all the land, eating and drinking and dancing, because of all the great spoil they had taken from the land of the Philistines and from the land of Judah.

cnv.text: 他帶大衛下去。匪徒們都分散在各處，正在吃喝、跳舞，因為他們從非利士地和猶大地搶來的戰利品很多。

ccb.text: 他带着大卫找到那里，见亚玛力人正散布在田野间吃喝狂欢，因为他们从非利士和犹大抢夺了很多财物。
